meta.title: Source Connection Types
meta.desc: Reference card listing the source def kinds supported by the demo task executor.

kinds.description: Look up a key in the hardcoded MOCK_DB dictionary.
Invoke GitHub Copilot CLI with an interpolated prompt template.
Single URL fetch with {{key}} interpolation, or multi-URL fan-out via _projections.url_list (JSONata array).
Yahoo Finance chart API — per-ticker requests mapped to quote shape. Prefer http+url_list for new sources.
